title: Speedy Panther Cat Catnip Toy for Indoor Cats, Cat Chew Toy for Teeth Cleaning, Bite-Resistant Plush Caterpillar Design, Dental Health Benefits, Green
features: INTERACTIVE DESIGN: Plush caterpillar toy with engaging textures and features that encourage self-play and keep cats entertained for hours
DENTAL BENEFITS: Specially textured surface helps clean teeth and massage gums during play, promoting better oral hygiene
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made with bite-resistant plush material and reinforced stitching to withstand active play sessions
CATNIP ENRICHED: Contains premium catnip to naturally attract cats and stimulate playful behaviour
SAFE PLAYTIME: Soft plush materials and secure components ensure worry-free play, perfect for indoor cats of all ages
description: Product description Transform your feline friend's playtime with this engaging catnip-infused caterpillar toy. The plush, bite-resistant design features a vibrant green exterior with a unique shaggy texture that cats love to paw and grab. Perfect for indoor cats, this interactive toy encourages self-play and helps maintain dental health through natural chewing action. The soft yet durable construction ensures hours of entertainment while promoting physical activity and mental stimulation. The adorable caterpillar design, complete with googly eyes and a red nose, makes it an irresistible companion for your pet. Whether batting it around or cuddling up for a snuggle session, this versatile toy provides multiple ways to play. The integrated catnip adds an extra element of excitement, making it even more enticing for your furry companion. Ideal for cats of all ages, this toy helps satisfy natural hunting instincts while providing a safe outlet for play behaviour. Directions For Dogs
